Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership. en-GB <<<<<<< Updated upstream Thu, 14 May 2026 12:20:21 GMT ======= Thu, 14 May 2026 12:22:06 GMT >>>>>>> Stashed changes
Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated) https://asim48-ctrl.github.io/starmer-watch/#overview <<<<<<< Updated upstream pressure-2026-05-14T12:20:21.982Z Thu, 14 May 2026 12:20:21 GMT Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 57/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 6.8%. ======= pressure-2026-05-14T12:22:06.305Z Thu, 14 May 2026 12:22:06 GMT Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 56/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 6.8%. >>>>>>> Stashed changes
Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: This letter from Wes Streeting reads awfully like the beginnings of an Andy Burnham deal...
"a battle of ideas, not of personalities or petty factionalism.
